full_text:
Sima Qian (Zizhang) 司馬遷 (子長)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sima Qian (司馬遷), styledZizhang (子長). Historian of the Former Han dynasty. Authored Records of the Grand Historian. Sima Qian was an historic figure affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Sima Qian lived during the Former Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
